# Elis Spa Dubai

> Premium European massage sanctuary on the R floor of Courtyard by Marriott, World Trade Center, Al Satwa, Dubai. Signature bamboo, hot stone, aroma, Thai and Moroccan bath rituals by expert therapists. Booking by WhatsApp.

## Facts
- Location: R floor, Courtyard by Marriott World Trade Center, Al Satwa, Dubai, UAE
- WhatsApp / Phone: +971 50 870 7137
- Hours: Open daily, 10:00 to 01:00
- Price range: 300 to 1500 AED

## Rituals
- Tension Relaxation Massage: 60 min 500 AED, 90 min 700 AED
- Deep Muscle Relaxation Massage: 60 min 550 AED, 90 min 750 AED
- Essential Oil Aroma Massage: 60 min 350 AED, 90 min 650 AED
- Thai Tranquility Therapy: 60 min 550 AED, 90 min 750 AED
- Hot Stone Enjoyment Massage: 60 min 550 AED, 90 min 750 AED
- Izil Diamond Mineralizing Facial: 35 min 300 AED
- Double Relaxation Massage: 60 min 1100 AED, 90 min 1500 AED
- Indulgences for Two: 60 min 1100 AED, 90 min 1500 AED
- Signature Bamboo Fusion Massage: 60 min 550 AED, 90 min 750 AED
- Traditional Thai Stretching Massage: 60 min 550 AED, 90 min 750 AED
- Moroccan Bath Body Ritual: 45 min 500 AED, 90 min 800 AED

## Therapists
Hayat, Noor, Lia, Nastya, Natalia, Ria, Victoria, Kate, Pavel
